name: Cynthia's Nacho Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of Celery soup (or milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef and set aside.
2. Cube the Velveeta cheese.
3. Mix the cheese with one of the soups and 1 can of milk in a crockpot.
4. Add the remaining ground beef to the crockpot.
5. Cook for 1 to 2 hours until the cheese is completely melted.
6. Serve with chips as a dip or serve over tacos.
